note: blocking spheres placed on 64 framework-O positions (every 3rd O); kUPS mcmc_widom
finding: blocking is a NO-OP for a physically-repulsive LJ recipe (dKH within SEM, q_st unchanged); load-bearing only where the recipe has an unphysical short-range well (OMS over-binding / the v0.5 1b case). The small K_H nudge is the insertion-count normalization (see BLOCKERS B2).
